Require Import Stdlib.Arith.PeanoNat.
Require Import Stdlib.Arith.Compare_dec.
From Coq Require Import Lia.
From Coq Require Import Program.

Definition key := nat.

Inductive tree (V : Type) : Type :=
| E : tree V
| T : tree V -> key -> V -> tree V -> tree V.

Arguments E {V}.
Arguments T {V}.

Fixpoint ForallT {V : Type} (P : key -> V -> Prop) (t : tree V) : Prop :=
  match t with
  | E => True
  | T l k v r => P k v /\ ForallT P l /\ ForallT P r
  end.

Inductive BST {V : Type} : tree V -> Prop :=
| BST_E : BST E
| BST_T : forall l x v r,
    ForallT (fun k _ => k < x) l ->
    ForallT (fun k _ => k > x) r ->
    BST l ->
    BST r ->
    BST (T l x v r).

Lemma ForallT_insert_E : forall (V : Type) (P : key -> V -> Prop) (k : key) (v : V),
  P k v -> ForallT P (T E k v E).
Proof.
  intros. simpl. repeat split; auto.
Qed.

Lemma ForallT_insert_T : forall (V : Type) (P : key -> V -> Prop) (l : tree V) (k' : key) (v' : V) (r : tree V) (k : key) (v : V) (t' : tree V),
  P k' v' -> ForallT P l -> ForallT P r ->
  ForallT P t' ->
  P k v ->
  ForallT P (if k <? k' then T t' k' v' r else if k' <? k then T l k' v' t' else T l k v r).
Proof.
  intros. destruct (k <? k'); [|destruct (k' <? k)]; simpl; repeat split; auto.
Qed.
